p.strong: Why at most one leader can be elected per term

div.p: Candidate A receives votes from: {1, 2, 3} → Becomes Leader
Candidate B receives votes from: {3, 4, 5} → Becomes Leader
Node 3 voted in BOTH elections! This is IMPOSSIBLE because:

ul.li: votedFor is set on first vote
Node cannot change vote in same term
Therefore: {1,2,3} and {3,4,5} cannot both be valid

ol.li: Candidate needs Q votes to win

div.p: If Node 3 crashes and restarts without persisting votedFor:

ol.li: Node 3 votes for Candidate B SAFETY VIOLATION: Two leaders!

div.p: Fix: Persist votedFor to disk BEFORE responding to RequestVote.
